depends_on.name: stimulus_presentation_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus presentation.

depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the element (e.g., neuron) whose response was measured.

file.name: response_file
file.documentation: The file containing the stimulus response data.

fields.name: stimulator_epochid
fields.documentation: Epoch identifier on the stimulator element whose presentation produced this response (e.g., 't00002'). Mirrors the v1 stimulus_response field.

fields.name: element_epochid
fields.documentation: Epoch identifier on the responding element (the element_id this document depends on) that aligns with the stimulator epoch above.
